blocks.content: Home by four. I checked my phone twice before I put it on the counter.

blocks.speaker: Larry
blocks.content: Jonathan does. I'm going to watch.

blocks.speaker: Larry
blocks.content: You'd have to ask Mr. Cole.

blocks.speaker: Larry Jr.
blocks.content: Mr. Cole says if you say yes he'll say yes.

blocks.speaker: Larry Jr.
blocks.content: Yesterday. He says I follow your lead.
I stood with that for a second.

blocks.speaker: Larry Jr.
blocks.content: Is Jonathan going to do the thing?
He went back to whatever he was drawing. I picked up my phone. No new message from Crystal.
The evening moved. Dinner. Homework. Larry Jr. eventually asleep. I checked my phone one more time before bed.
I told myself she'd explain in the morning. That was probably true. That was probably what was happening.
I went to sleep telling myself that.
